name: 0G Research Scout
description: A portable OpenClaw-style agent that researches a topic, reasons through 0G Compute, and persists memory/log artifacts to 0G Storage.

skills.name: 0g-compute
skills.description: Route OpenAI-compatible chat completions through the 0G Compute router.

skills.name: 0g-storage-memory
skills.description: Package agent files, memory, and run logs for upload to 0G Storage.
